# Release v1.4.2

Add `devin-desktop` editor detection to `publish-release.sh` for proper Devin IDE integration.

---

## Changelog

## [1.4.2] - 2026-06-03

### Fixed

- `publish-release.sh` now correctly detects and uses `devin-desktop` CLI when running from the Devin IDE — added `devin-desktop` check in the editor fallback chain before `code`

[1.4.2]: https://github.com/TenGosc007/t3core/compare/v1.4.1...v1.4.2
